setup_intro: Read the mandate text below, then enter your bank details. The mandate version you accept is recorded with your authorisation.
iban_invalid: Please enter a valid IBAN (15–34 characters).
must_accept_mandate: Please accept the SEPA mandate text before continuing.
existing_profile_notice: A SEPA profile already exists for this member. Submitting will update the IBAN / BIC and record a new mandate consent.
mandates_intro: Overview of all members' SEPA direct-debit mandates.
column_tooltip: SEPA mandate active during the subscription term
no_profile: No SEPA profile for this member.
